summary: iter201 Convention Management CRUD + Events Suite Consolidation - Backend 100% passed, Frontend sidebar changes verified, EchoEventsPanel module loading issue fixed

integration_issues.issue: Panel takes long time to load after clicking Echo Events in sidebar. Shows 'Loading full app...' spinner. May be due to lazy loading of multiple sub-modules.

action_items: Verify EchoEventsPanel loads correctly with all 14 tabs (Dashboard, CRM, Master Ops, BEO Gantt, Events, Contracts, Menus, Calendar, Events Report, Scenario Planner, AI Event Brief, Conventions, Analytics, Admin)
Test the 4 new tabs (ee-tab-report, ee-tab-scenario, ee-tab-ai-brief, ee-tab-conventions) render correctly when clicked
Test Convention Management CRUD UI inside the Conventions tab
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/client/modules/EchoEvents/hooks/useUserPreferences.ts was corrupted (all code on single line causing syntax errors). File has been reformatted to 297 lines with proper structure.
Sidebar correctly updated - 4 entries (Events Report, Scenario Planner, AI Event Brief, Conventions) removed from sidebar and consolidated into Echo Events panel as tabs
panel-registry.ts correctly updated to load EchoEventsPanel.tsx for echo-events key
